worktree.commit_sha_note: This tracked evidence file intentionally does not claim to contain its own final commit SHA. The final remediation commit SHA is returned by the worker final JSON after the commit is created.

scope_amendment.source: tt-016 approved the GATES-003 scope repair for three paths outside the original writeAllowed list.

approved_paths.limit: Only dependency resolution caused by required crates/but-api/Cargo.toml changes for GATES-003.
Only legacy merge_gate CLI test registration.

api_gate_entry_points: crates/but-api/src/legacy/forge.rs:445 merge_review calls enforce_merge_gate before the forge await
crates/but-api/src/legacy/forge.rs:477 set_review_auto_merge calls enforce_merge_gate before the forge await

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:10 merge_gate_authorize_and_review_requirement asserts impl is denied perm.denied through merge_review and set_review_auto_merge, and maint with a distinct approval reaches the forge call without a governance denial.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:60 shows merge_gate_authorize_and_review_requirement failed before implementation with unstructured merge gate errors.
requirement_results.notes: The positive maint path proves the local gate decision and execution past the gate; actual forge-network merge completion is structural/out-of-local-scope for this local fixture.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:62 merge_gate_below_min_approvals_blocked asserts a maint merge with zero approving verdicts is denied gate.review_required and names the approval shortfall, while main remains unchanged.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:61 and .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:78 show the below-min-approvals test failed before implementation.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:91 merge_gate_two_group_both_present_proceeds first proves missing code-reviewers and maintainers approvals are denied, then seeds one approval from each group at head and asserts no governance denial.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:62 and .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:83 show the two-group test failed before implementation.
requirement_results.notes: The both-present positive path proves the local gate decision and execution past the gate; actual forge-network merge completion is structural/out-of-local-scope for this local fixture.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:129 merge_gate_dryrun_and_malformed_failclosed asserts the dry-run-equivalent denied merge still requires merge authority and mutates neither main nor verdicts, then asserts malformed target-ref gates.toml returns config.invalid.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:61 and .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:73 show the dryrun/malformed test failed before implementation.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:10 covers impl merge_review perm.denied, impl set_review_auto_merge perm.denied, and maint with distinct approval permitted by the gate.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:60 shows the AC-1/TC-1 test failed before implementation.
requirement_results.notes: Positive forge completion is structural/out-of-local-scope; the test asserts no governance denial after the gate.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:62 covers gate.review_required with a non-empty unmet approval shortfall for below min_approvals.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:78 shows the AC-2/TC-2 test failed before implementation.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:91 covers two-group parsing/enforcement from the target-ref gates.toml and the both-groups-approve-at-head permitted decision.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:83 shows the AC-3/TC-3 test failed before implementation.
requirement_results.notes: Positive forge completion is structural/out-of-local-scope; the test asserts no governance denial after both required groups approve.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:129 covers dry-run-no-bypass behavior, unchanged refs/verdicts after denial, and config.invalid for malformed target-ref governance config.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:73 shows the AC-4/TC-4 test failed before implementation.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/src/legacy/forge.rs:445 and crates/but-api/src/legacy/forge.rs:477 call enforce_merge_gate before the inner forge .await; function-scoped greps returned 1 for each entry point.
requirement_results.verify: grep -A 25 'fn merge_review' crates/but-api/src/legacy/forge.rs | grep -c enforce_merge_gate && grep -A 25 'fn set_review_auto_merge' crates/but-api/src/legacy/forge.rs | grep -c enforce_merge_gate
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:60 shows the both-entry-point authorization test failed before implementation.

requirement_results.evidence: crates/but-api/src/legacy/merge_gate.rs:151 load_merge_governance_config reads permissions and gates through read_config_blob(repo, target_ref, ...); crates/but-api/src/legacy/merge_gate.rs:168 resolves the target ref and reads blobs from that commit tree. The working-tree read negative grep returned no matches.
requirement_results.red_evidence: .tmp/GATES-003/red-output.txt:83 shows the two-group/target-ref plumbing test failed before implementation.

verification.evidence: Finished dev profile for both target crates.
Finished dev profile with zero clippy warnings.
rustdoc exited 0; it reported a pre-existing unresolved intra-doc link warning in crates/but-api/src/open/editor.rs:227.

verification.command: if grep -rEn 'workdir|std::fs::read|read_to_string' crates/but-api/src/legacy/merge_gate.rs; then exit 1; else printf 'no matches\n'; fi
if grep -rEn 'write_permission\(|RepoExclusive|exclusive_worktree_access' crates/but-api/src/legacy/merge_gate.rs; then exit 1; else printf 'no matches\n'; fi
if grep -rEni 'implementer|reviewer|maintainer' crates/but-api/src/legacy/merge_gate.rs; then exit 1; else printf 'no matches\n'; fi

evidence: crates/but-api/src/legacy/forge.rs:445 calls enforce_merge_gate inside merge_review before the forge merge_review .await.
crates/but-api/src/legacy/forge.rs:477 calls enforce_merge_gate inside set_review_auto_merge before the forge set_review_auto_merge_state .await.
crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:10 denies impl on both entry points and permits maint only after review requirements are satisfied.
crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:62 denies below-min approvals with gate.review_required.
crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:91 denies missing group approvals and permits both-required-groups approvals at head.
crates/but-api/tests/merge_gate.rs:129 denies dry-run-equivalent unauthorized merges and fails closed on malformed target-ref config.
Negative greps found no working-tree config read, no write-permission lock overload, and no role-name hardcoding in crates/but-api/src/legacy/merge_gate.rs.

red_evidence.summary: cargo test -p but-api merge_gate failed with all four merge_gate tests before production implementation returned structured governance errors.
